account.closeAccountDes: By delete your account, any remaining points will be forfeited and are non-refundable. Would you like to proceed?
account.dontCloseAccountDes:
To delete your account, please ensure 
• All servers are terminated &
• Any negative points balance is cleared.

If you have any questions, feel free to contact us for assistance.
account.insufficientPointDes: You have insufficient points. Please top up.
account.insufficientBalanceDes: Your points balance is insufficient. To create a server, please ensure you have enough points to cover the setup fee and the first hour's billing.
account.changeEmailDes: A One-Time Password (OTP) has been sent to your new email address. If you don’t see it in your inbox, please check your junk or spam folder.
account.tipsAccountInfo: Tips: Account information will be used for billing purpose.
account.supportDes: Welcome! Feel free to leave us a message, and we’ll get back to you as soon as we can.

auth.note: I have read and agree with the terms of
auth.forgotPassDes: We will send you a temporary One Time Password (OTP) to reset the password.
auth.successfullyNote: Thank you for signing up with Ready Server! To enhance your account security, please complete your profile and verify your mobile phone number via SMS.
auth.forgotLoginEmailDes: Please contact our support team for help. Our team will help you retrieve your account.
auth.completedDes: You are ONE step away from completing the sign up! To enhance your user experience, let us know you better.
auth.setupBioFirstTime: Set up biometric login for a quicker and more secure way to access your account!
auth.welcomeDes: Your account is ready! Top up anytime to create your VPS. Want to try it first? Redeem free points via mobile verification. ── see the home notice for details.
auth.verifyEmailOtpDes: We have sent a verification code to your email. Enter the one time code to proceed.
auth.delNoticeDes:
Oops! It looks like this email is still within the cooldown period for creating a new account. Our system applies a 1-year cooldown to ensure fair distribution of rewards for new accounts.

Once the cooldown period is over, you’ll be able to use this email to create a new account.
auth.publicBetaDes: Starting from the 1st January 2025, we have officially rolled out the VPS service, making it available for public beta testing to allow users to explore its features.
auth.descriptionFirst: You are aware that SMTP ports 25, 465 and 587 are currently restricted on the VPS service.
auth.descriptionSecond: You must be a resident of one of the following countries or regions in order to be eligible: Singapore, Australia, Brunei, Cambodia, China, Hong Kong, Indonesia, Japan, South Korea, Laos, Macao, Malaysia, New Zealand, Philippines, Taiwan, Thailand, Timor-Leste or Vietnam.

setting.title: Setting
setting.serverDowntimeDes: Notify me when my server experience downtime.
setting.memoryUsageDes: Notify me when the server resource usage  exceeded 90%.
setting.invoiceRemindersDes: Notify me if my point balance is insufficient for next settlement.
setting.paymentSuccessDes: Notify me when a payment is successfully processed.
setting.loginAttemptsDes: Notify me when successful login from different devices.
setting.unauthorisedAccessDes: Notify me when 3 consecutive log in failure.
setting.name: Your name
setting.tipsAllowBiometric: Tips: Allow biometric log in for better security and faster log in.
setting.enterPasswordDes: You're all set! Please enter your new password to continue.
setting.tipsMobile: 2. Verify mobile number for secondary verification.
setting.companyNameDes: Please ensure your Business Registration Number is accurate, as it will be used for billing and tax purposes. You are responsible for the correctness of the information provided.
setting.addressOtherDes: I acknowledge that the information provided is correct and that I understand the local tax exemption laws applicable to my selected country.
setting.addressOtherDes2: I am a person belonging in Singapore and/or have business operations or a fixed establishment in Singapore. Accordingly, I am subject to the Singapore Goods and Services Tax Act, and I acknowledge that Singapore GST is applicable and will be charged.
setting.addressOtherDes3: I confirm that I am an overseas customer, do not belong in Singapore, and do not have any business operations or fixed establishment in Singapore for Goods and Services Tax (GST) purposes.
setting.unableUpdateDes:
Your account points balance is below zero. To update your login credentials, please top up your account to settle any outstanding negative points balance.

For assistance or questions, don't hesitate to reach out to us.

validate.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validate.passwordValidate:
To ensure your account's security, please create a password that meets the following criteria:
• 8 to 12 characters long
• At least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
• At least one lowercase letter (a-z)
• At least one number (0-9)
• At least one special character (!, @, #, $, *, &)
Please update your password to match this format and continue signing up.
validate.passwordValidateTitle: Secure Your Account with a Strong Password

errorScreen.title: Something went wrong!
errorScreen.friendlySubtitle: This is the screen that your users will see in production when an error is thrown. You'll want to customize this message (located in `app/i18n/en.ts`) and probably the layout as well (`app/screens/ErrorScreen`). If you want to remove this entirely, check `app/app.tsx` for the <ErrorBoundary> component.

serverList.title: My VPS List
serverList.noActiveServerDescription:
There is no record of active server.
Go to Home & create server.

notification.enablePush: Enable Push Notifications to stay updated with important notices and personalised alerts.

myvps.emptyDes:
There is no record of active server.
Go to Home & create server.
myvps.rebootDes: This will cause a brief downtime, and any unsaved data may be lost. Please save your work before proceeding.
myvps.shutdownDes: The server will shut down gracefully. You’ll need to start it again to restore services.
myvps.powerOffDes: Are you sure you want to power off the server? This will stop all services and disconnect active users.
myvps.powerOnDes: Do you want to power on the server? It may take a few moments for all services to become available.
myvps.terminatingDescription:
You are about to terminate your server. This action is irreversible and will result in the loss of all data and configurations associated with this server.

Please ensure you have backed up any important information before proceeding.

Upon termination, any applicable charges will be immediately deducted from your account balance.
myvps.enableConsoleDes: This action provides you with low-level control and can affect the server’s performance and security. Please confirm to proceed.
myvps.rescueDisableDes: Disabling Rescue Mode will power off your server. You will need to manually power it back on to restore services. Please confirm to proceed.
myvps.terminatingNoti: We're processing your request to terminate the server (Server ID:{{id}}). You'll receive a notification in your inbox once the process is complete. Thank you for your patience!
myvps.insufficientPointsMyDes: Please ensure that you have sufficient points balance for upcoming points charges.
myvps.serverErr: Your server has encountered an unexpected error. To resolve this issue, please perform a reboot. Please contact support for assistance.
myvps.rescueDes: This action allows for recovery and troubleshooting but may affect your server's current state.
myvps.disableConsoleDes: Disabling Console Access will restrict direct server management through the console. Please confirm to proceed.
myvps.insufficientTopupDes:
Your account balance is below zero.
Please top up your points before creating a new VPS instance.
myvps.editServerUnavailableDes:
Your server is currently suspended due to failed daily settlements caused by insufficient points balance. To edit your server, please top up your account.

If you need any assistance or have questions, feel free to reach out to us.
myvps.serverServicesUnavailableDes:
Your server is currently suspended due to failed daily settlements caused by insufficient points balance. To resume your server services, please top up your account.

If you need any assistance or have questions, feel free to reach out to us.
myvps.suspendedBottomDes: Suspended: Insufficient points balance. Top up to resume your server.
myvps.suspendedBottomContent:
Your server (V10042-FJW4FE) has been suspended due to insufficient points balance. It is currently inactive, but your data remains safe.

Please top up by {{date}} to avoid permanent termination and data loss.

Missed settlement charges will be deducted upon top-up, and your VPS will resume once the deduction is successful.
myvps.windowsDescription:
By selecting Windows OS, you agree to the applicable monthly Windows License charges, billed at the end of each month, in addition to regular daily points usage.

Windows License Billing
• Billed monthly only (not hourly)
• Minimum charge: 1 full month, even if activated mid-month
• License fees are deducted on the first day of each month.
• Removing Windows within the month does not waive the charge

Flat Monthly Points
• 1/2/4 vCPU cores → 2,880 points
• 8 vCPU cores → 5760 points
• No propating -- full monthly charge applies once activated

intro.title2: Unmetered Data with Fair Usage Management
intro.description1: With a heritage of reliability, we've been hosting and managing network infrastructure for over 8 years.
intro.description2: Experience seamless performance with ReadyServer's unlimited data transfer, fair use policy, and automatic bandwidth management solution
intro.description3: Get large-scale affordable VPS hosting with competitive price performance
